creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to itwrx from comment #0)
Version 2.8.2 of icingaweb2 is not compatible with php81. It should always have been marked BROKEN. You need to use the latest icingaweb2 package >= 2.11.3.

You can either wait ~6 more weeks for that to land in quarterly, or switch to the latest package branch. Alternatively someone needs to MFH icingaweb2, but that is kind of a split decision as for icingaweb2-php74 it would be a major upgrade which should not be MFH'ed and for icingaweb2-php81 it fixes a broken package, which should be MFH'ed.
